Description: Ring of Domination — corrupts and dominates a hero, weakening their will.
DescriptionEn: Ring of Domination — corrupts and dominates a hero, weakening their will.
DescriptionFr: Anneau de Domination — corrompt et domine un héros, affaiblissant sa volonté.
DescriptionEffects: Deals 250 magic damage to all enemies.
DescriptionEffectsEn: Deals 250 magic damage to all enemies.
DescriptionEffectsFr: Inflige 250 dégâts magiques à tous les ennemis.
